title: tropilis moorei
intro: Tropilis moorei, also known as Tummo, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in the Himalayan region. Traditionally, Tropilis moorei has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Tropilis moorei can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or infusions, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic remedies like powders and ointments.
